task_comp_comp_001_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Config (src/config.py)
Centralized configuration management. Holds constants like window dimensions, themes, and decimal precision settings globally.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Constants: WINDOW_WIDTH: int = 400, WINDOW_HEIGHT: int = 600, DEFAULT_PRECISION: int = 100

task_comp_comp_009_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement LoggerService (src/services/logger.py)
Captures application runtime errors and logs state transitions, critical for production debugging of high-precision calculations.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: Logger
Functions:
  Logger.error(self, msg: str)
  Logger.info(self, msg: str)

task_comp_comp_005_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement DisplayUI (src/ui/display.py)
Wraps tkinter Text/Entry widgets. Includes horizontal scrolling for large numbers exceeding display width.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: DisplayFrame
Functions:
  DisplayFrame.update_text(self, text: str) -> None
  DisplayFrame.enable_scroll(self) -> None

task_comp_comp_006_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement ButtonUI (src/ui/buttons.py)
Custom button widgets. Manages click events and visual feedback for the user grid.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: CalcButton
Functions:
  CalcButton.set_active(self, active: bool) -> None

task_comp_comp_002_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement CalcModel (src/models/calculator.py)
Manages calculator state using Decimal. Includes serialization methods for persistent state and type-safe property setters for validation.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: CalculatorState
Functions:
  CalculatorState.to_dict(self) -> dict
  CalculatorState.from_dict(self, data: dict) -> None
  CalculatorState.set_value(self, val: str) -> None

task_comp_comp_003_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement MathEngine (src/services/math_engine.py)
High-precision arithmetic using decimal.Context. Handles division by zero and invalid operation exceptions explicitly.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: MathEngine
Functions:
  MathEngine.add(self, a: str, b: str) -> str
  MathEngine.divide(self, a: str, b: str) -> str

task_comp_comp_010_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement StringSanitizer (src/services/sanitizer.py)
Handles numeric string sanitization. Strips whitespace, converts locales, and normalizes scientific notation for the MathEngine.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: Sanitizer
Functions:
  Sanitizer.sanitize(self, input: str) -> str

task_comp_comp_007_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement MainLayout (src/ui/layout.py)
Organizes the display and button grid. Provides the main window interface for the Controller to trigger screen updates.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: CalculatorWindow
Functions:
  CalculatorWindow.get_controller(self) -> CalcController

task_comp_comp_004_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Controller (src/controller.py)
Orchestrates UI and model. Bridges input handling, mathematical execution, and UI updates, including dependency injection of the main layout.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: CalcController
Functions:
  CalcController.handle_input(self, input: str) -> None

task_comp_comp_008_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement AppEntry (src/main.py)
Application root. Implements a DI container to instantiate the model, engine, and controller before binding them to the root TK instance.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Functions:
  main() -> None

task_integration_test.description: Final integration: final build check and smoke tests
